prompt:
You are Agent 2 of 4 working on the TaskFlow Pro project at /var/folders/45/myq5db_n6q5cyhtb39vkbmp80000gn/T/twining-bench-rrnFry.

A previous developer implemented email notifications using an EventBus pattern in src/services/notification.service.ts.

Your task: Extend the notification system with SMS and webhook channels.

1. Review the existing notification service and EventBus implementation before writing any code.
2. Add an SMS channel handler that subscribes to the EventBus.
3. Add a webhook channel handler that subscribes to the EventBus.
4. Both new handlers must follow the same EventBus subscription pattern already in place.
5. Add tests for the new channel handlers.

Do NOT redesign the EventBus or the notification service — extend, do not replace.

parameters.task: Extend notification system with SMS and webhook channel handlers that subscribe to the existing EventBus

parameters.command: ls /private/var/folders/45/myq5db_n6q5cyhtb39vkbmp80000gn/T/twining-bench-rrnFry/tests/ 2>/dev/null || ls /private/var/folders/45/myq5db_n6q5cyhtb39vkbmp80000gn/T/twining-bench-rrnFry/test/ 2>/dev/null || echo "no test dir found"

alternatives.option: Add SMS and webhook handling inside the existing NotificationService class
alternatives.reason_rejected: Violates single responsibility; makes the class harder to test and maintain
Over-engineering for two concrete channels; task says extend, not redesign

parameters.context: Need to extend the notification system with SMS and webhook channels. The existing NotificationService uses EventBus.on() for order:created events.
parameters.rationale: Each channel gets its own service class that takes EventBus in its constructor and subscribes via eventBus.on(), matching the existing pattern. Separate classes keep channels independently testable and deployable.
parameters.summary: Add SMS and webhook notification channels as separate service classes subscribing to EventBus

parameters.detail: Created SmsNotificationService and WebhookNotificationService, both following the existing EventBus subscription pattern (eventBus.on()). Both handle order:created and order:status-changed events. SMS uses compact text messages; webhook delivers structured JSON payloads to a configured URL. All 84 tests pass (14 new).
parameters.summary: Agent 2: Added SMS and webhook notification channels subscribing to EventBus, with 14 passing tests
